arts.ttl: QPR make big manager decision on eve of Hull City meeting
arts.sum: We know what this club means to its supporters and they are a big part of why we managed to get ourselves out of the situation we were in last season, alongside the players who showed a lot of courage. The Spaniard, who masterminded a fine recovery away from the bottom of the table to survival last season after arriving at the club in late October following the departure of Gareth Ainsworth, has been rewarded with fresh terms to keep him in West London.

arts.ttl: Hull City head coach Tim Walter keen to see key MKM Stadium change
arts.sum: More than 22,600 roared the Tigers on to victory on what was a special occasion as the club celebrated its 120th birthday in style with a thumping victory, and Walter says he wants to see music played after goals are scored at the MKM, having been asked what it was like to hear Status Quo's iconic Rocking All Over the World at full-time, the club's anthem of choice to celebrate home victory, as he savoured his first success in front of the home fans. Then you know you have scored, and then everybody can see it and can hear it and that's a good sign," he said when asked if he would like to see it introduced at City.

arts.ttl: How Hull City will look to try and combat 'dangerous' QPR's unusual challenge
arts.sum: Given the tight turnaround since Saturday's game with Cardiff, Walter hasn't been able to prepare on the training pitch with a shortened pitch. City were tepid in a 2-0 defeat at Rangers in December last season, a result which hampered their hopes of a play-off push and Walter says the challenge facing them both at Loftus Road and Carrow Road this week is a big test of their credentials, and one he's looking forward seeing how his players respond to.

arts.ttl: QPR vs Hull predictions: Hoops set for first home success
arts.sum: QPR and Hull are looking to move up the Championship table when they meet at Loftus Road on Tuesday night and Phil Agius expects the Hoops to collect their first home league win this season.
